id.description: Opaque, stable guild id (a UUID). Independent of the display name and used as the file name.

name.description: Unique (case-insensitive) display name shown as the WHO tag.

leader_id.description: Username of the current guild leader; must also appear in members with rank LEADER.

members.description: The guild roster, in no particular order; ordering for display is derived from join_order.

join_order.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number; lower means longer-tenured. Used to pick a successor leader when the leader departs.
